title: Court hears arguments in lawsuit challenging key permit for mine
summary: James Brooks Alaska Beacon A Bethel tribal government argued Friday in Anchorage Superior Court that the state improperly granted a permit for the planned Donlin Gold mine, while the state argued the mine met key environmental standards. Orutsararmiut Native Council filed a lawsuit that seeks to reverse a key construction permit for the mine in Southwest Alaska. The council, represented by the environmental law firm Earthjustice...

title: Keep Bears At Bay: The Importance of Securing Dumpster Bars
summary: Around town, you might have seen dumpsters with bars over the top. These installations are by the city to stop bears from accessing the garbage bags inside the dumpsters. The bar must be lowered to open the dumpster and raised back up and then secured with the carabiner (aka clip) attached after it...
